## 💭 Problem

Describe the snapshot, import, browsing, or export workflow that could be improved.

## ✨ Proposed solution

Describe the behavior you would like and provide an example where useful.

## 🔀 Alternatives considered

Describe alternative approaches or current workarounds.

## 📦 Scope and data impact

Note whether this changes the Angular renderer, typed RPC contract, SQLite schema, Soccerbot integration, documentation, or packaged application.

## 📝 Additional context

Add mockups, example Transfermarkt URLs, reference dates, or related links.
